rationale: Extend grammar to cover nested extra_context, remote template sources, env‑var paths, failing hooks, and extra newline literals

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

extra_context_pair
    : STRING ':' extra_context_value
    ;

extra_context_value
    : STRING
    | json_bool
    | list_literal
    | object_literal
    ;

list_literal
    : '[' (STRING (',' STRING)*)? ']'
    ;

object_literal
    : '{' (extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)*)? '}'
    ;

hook_script
    : 'null'
    | '"from pathlib import Path\\nPath(\'HOOK_OK\').write_text(\'ok\', encoding=\'utf-8\')\\n"'
    | '"raise SystemExit(1)\\n"'
    | '"raise ValueError(\'hook fail\')\\n"'
    ;
